# Resume Fire

> Resume Fire is a Russian-language Telegram bot for Human + ATS analysis of PDF resumes. It provides a free preview before any full-report purchase and does not promise employment or invent candidate achievements.

Use the pages below for product facts and methodology. The primary user action is [open Resume Fire Bot in Telegram](https://t.me/ResumeFireBot?start=github-repo).

## Product and methodology

- [Resume Fire overview](https://resumefire.github.io/index.html.md): Product purpose, free preview, Human and ATS checks, FAQ, and Telegram bot link.
- [Why resumes should not receive one score](https://resumefire.github.io/human-ats-razbor-rezyume.html.md): Human + ATS methodology, recommendation priorities, free preview, and assessment boundaries.
- [Resume checklist before applying](https://resumefire.github.io/proverit-rezyume-pered-otklikom.html.md): Practical checks for role positioning, experience, PDF parsing, skills, and prioritisation.

## Optional

- [XML sitemap](https://resumefire.github.io/sitemap.xml): Complete list of indexable HTML pages.
